# Task
Name: rt/consumes
Title: Consumes golden
Branch: rt/consumes
Directory: .subtask/tasks/rt--consumes (PLAN.md)

## Workspace
Your working directory is `/tmp/ws`. This IS your copy of the project — a git worktree of `main` on branch `rt/consumes`.

- Use paths relative to cwd, or absolute paths under cwd.
- Never use absolute paths to other clones of this project (e.g. `/Users/.../Code/<projectname>`). Edits outside your worktree will not appear on your task branch and will not merge.
- If unsure, run `pwd` and `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` — both should match cwd.

Per-task description.

## Stage: impl
Implement per PLAN.md.

Artifacts this step consumes (read them before starting):
